entries.content: FIR (First Information Report) is recorded under CrPC/BNSS procedures for cognizable offences. The informant may request a copy; investigation follows police station jurisdiction.
entries.source_name: Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita / CrPC (procedure overview)

entries.content: Payment of Wages Act addresses timelines and deductions for wages; disputes often start with labour office / inspectorate before tribunals.
Motor vehicle offences may be challaned; licence and registration matters are handled by RTO; disputes may involve appellate forums as per MV Act rules.
IT Act provisions cover certain cyber offences; complaints may be filed with cyber cells and through national cybercrime reporting channels alongside police FIR where applicable.
Consumer Protection Act provides for consumer commissions at district/state/national levels based on pecuniary jurisdiction; evidence includes bills and correspondence.
Land records, mutation, and revenue disputes are typically handled through tehsil/revenue officers and SDM-level authorities; civil courts may hear title suits.
entries.source_name: State revenue / land revenue laws (refer state portal)

entries.content: Maintenance and domestic violence remedies may involve family courts and protection officers under applicable personal laws and DV Act procedures.
RTI applications are filed to public authorities with prescribed fees; first appeal lies to appellate authority as per RTI Act.
Contract disputes may be pursued through civil courts or alternative dispute resolution depending on agreements, jurisdiction, and pecuniary limits.
India has district judiciary, High Courts, and the Supreme Court; filing formats and limitation periods are governed by procedural codes and court rules.
PF/ESI compliance is administered by statutory bodies; disputes on contributions may involve PF/ESI authorities and labour forums as applicable.
Motor accident claims may involve insurance processes and Motor Accident Claims Tribunals depending on facts and jurisdiction.
Banking customers may escalate grievances through the bank’s internal mechanism and the RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme where applicable; timelines and forms are published on RBI’s official site.
entries.source_name: Reserve Bank of India — ombudsman scheme (overview)

entries.content: Sanitation, illegal construction, and street infrastructure complaints are typically filed with the municipal corporation or urban local body through prescribed civic grievance channels.
Maintenance tribunals under the Maintenance and Welfare of Parents and Senior Citizens Act provide a statutory route for maintenance applications subject to jurisdictional rules.

School and board-level grievances often start with the institution and the state education department; fee or service deficiency facets may overlap with consumer commission jurisdiction depending on facts.
Domestic violence remedies include protection orders, residence orders, and monetary reliefs through magistrates; Protection Officers assist with applications under the DV Act framework.
entries.source_name: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act (overview)
